sentences.target: Der Sänger probt heute im Park.

translations.de: Der Sänger probt heute im Park.
translations.en: The singer is rehearsing in the park.
translations.es: El cantante está ensayando hoy en el parque.
translations.fr: Le chanteur répète aujourd’hui au parc.
translations.it: Il cantante sta provando oggi al parco.
translations.pt: O cantor está ensaiando hoje no parque.
translations.vi: Hôm nay ca sĩ đang tập ở công viên.
translations.nl: De zanger repeteert vandaag in het park.
translations.hu: Az énekes ma a parkban próbál.
translations.hi: गायक आज पार्क में रिहर्सल कर रहा है।
translations.el: Ο τραγουδιστής κάνει πρόβα σήμερα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Sangeren øver i parken i dag.
translations.id: Penyanyi itu berlatih di taman hari ini.
translations.sv: Sångaren repeterar i parken i dag.
translations.da: Sangeren øver i parken i dag.
translations.ja: 歌手は今日公園で練習しています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the action.
Preposition (contraction of “in dem”), governs dative; marks a locative phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition (dative singular), place.

sentences.target: Du kennst den Sänger aus der Bar.
sentences.reading: /duː kɛnst deːn ˈzɛŋɐ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ baːʁ/

translations.de: Du kennst den Sänger aus der Bar.
translations.ipa: /duː kɛnst deːn ˈzɛŋɐ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ baːʁ/
translations.en: You know the singer from the bar.
translations.fr: Tu connais le chanteur du bar.
translations.ko: 너는 그 바에서 보던 가수를 알고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你认识那家酒吧的歌手。
translations.pt: Você conhece o cantor do bar.
translations.vi: Bạn biết ca sĩ ở quán bar.
translations.nl: Je kent de zanger uit de kroeg.
translations.hi: तुम उस बार के गायक को जानते हो।
translations.el: Ξέρεις τον τραγουδιστή από το μπαρ.
translations.id: Kamu kenal penyanyi dari bar itu.
translations.ro: Îl cunoști pe cântărețul de la bar.
translations.ja: あなたはバーの歌手を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 2nd person; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object.
Common noun; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition meaning ‘from’, governs dative; indicates source/origin.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun; object of the preposition, location/source.

sentences.target: Ich folge dem Sänger auf Instagram.

translations.de: Ich folge dem Sänger auf Instagram.
translations.en: I follow the singer on Instagram.
translations.fr: Je suis le chanteur sur Instagram.
translations.ko: 나는 그 가수를 인스타그램에서 팔로우하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在 Instagram 上关注这位歌手。
translations.yue: 我喺 Instagram 追蹤嗰位歌手。
translations.ru: Я слежу за этим певцом в Instagram.
translations.pt: Eu sigo o cantor no Instagram.
translations.vi: Tôi theo dõi ca sĩ đó trên Instagram.
translations.nl: Ik volg die zanger op Instagram.
translations.uk: Я стежу за цим співаком в Instagram.
translations.hi: मैं इंस्टाग्राम पर उस गायक को फॉलो करता हूँ।
translations.id: Aku mengikuti penyanyi itu di Instagram.
translations.ro: Îl urmăresc pe cântăreț pe Instagram.
translations.ja: 私はその歌手をインスタグラムでフォローしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects a dative object.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marks the indirect object.
Common noun; dative indirect object of ‘folge’.
Preposition meaning ‘on’, governs dative here (static location/platform).
Proper noun; object of the preposition, platform name.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester liebt den Sänger aus Italien.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ liːpt deːn ˈzɛŋɐ aʊ̯s iˈtaːli̯ən/

translations.de: Meine Schwester liebt den Sänger aus Italien.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ liːpt deːn ˈzɛŋɐ aʊ̯s iˈtaːli̯ən/
translations.en: My sister loves the singer from Italy.
translations.es: Mi hermana adora al cantante italiano.
translations.fr: Ma sœur adore le chanteur italien.
translations.it: Mia sorella ama il cantante italiano.
translations.ko: 내 여동생은 이탈리아 출신의 가수를 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹喜欢那位意大利歌手。
translations.yue: 我妹妹好鍾意嗰位意大利歌手。
translations.pt: Minha irmã adora o cantor italiano.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim İtalyan şarkıcıyı çok seviyor.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi thích ca sĩ người Ý.
translations.nl: Mijn zus houdt van de Italiaanse zanger.
translations.hu: A nővérem imádja az olasz énekest.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन इतालवी गायक को बहुत पसंद करती है।
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου λατρεύει τον Ιταλό τραγουδιστή.
translations.nb: Søsteren min elsker den italienske sangeren.
translations.id: Adik saya suka penyanyi Italia itu.
translations.sv: Min syster älskar den italienska sångaren.
translations.ro: Sora mea îl iubește pe cântărețul italian.
translations.da: Min søster elsker den italienske sanger.
translations.ja: 私の妹はイタリアの歌手が大好きです。
